summary: Taiki Maeda has flipped bullish in his latest video, arguing that the crypto market bottom is in and predicting Bitcoin prices will move higher.
narrative: After spending months successfully shorting Ethereum, his newest analysis suggests the bearish momentum has exhausted itself and markets are now bottoming. He specifically highlights potential upside catalysts like STRC and critiques the consensus 4-Year Cycle theory to justify a shift toward accumulating long positions.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
